ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the bug belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "steps_to_reproduce" TEXT /* Steps to reproduce the bug */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the bug */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., Major, Minor, Critical) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug (e.g., P1, P2, P3) */,
  "screenshot" TEXT /* Screenshot of the bug */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the bug was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the bug was last updated */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer the bug is assigned to */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "is_reopened" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bug was reopened */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bug is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug status */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the bug status was last updated */,
  "resolved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who resolved the bug */,
  "reopened_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reopened the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_status_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_status_reopened_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reopened_by_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_status_resolved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the developer (e.g., Junior, Senior, Lead) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the developer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the developer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug assignment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the assignment belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer the bug is assigned to */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the bug was assigned */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved by the assigned developer */,
  "reassigned_at" TEXT /* Date the bug was reassigned */,
  "reassigned_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reassigned the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_reassigned_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reassigned_by_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_assignments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "uploaded_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Developer, Reporter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., Create Bug, Edit Bug, Delete Bug) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the audit belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action made by the developer (e.g., Created Bug, Edited Bug, Deleted Bug) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the action was last updated */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
